{{Quote|This has not been a good day for the Empire!|[[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]]|<ref name="Crimson Empire 5">[[Crimson Empire 5|''Crimson Empire'' 5]]</ref>}}
The '''Battle of Phaeda''' occurred in [[11 ABY/Legends|11 ABY]].

==Background==
After the [[Attack on the Imperial Royal Guard Academy]], [[Kir Kanos]] escaped to the relatively quiet world of [[Phaeda/Legends|Phaeda]]. After killing several [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] officers and an entire [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] [[Squad/Legends|squad]] in a [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]] brawl, Kanos was led to a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] safehouse by [[Tem Merkon]], who then introduced him to [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Mirith Sinn]], the leader of the undercover Republic cell on Phaeda.

==The battle==
However, word of the disturbance spread to the local Imperial commander, [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Xexus Shev]], and afterwards to [[Imperial High Command/Legends|Central Command]], where [[Redd Wessel]] notified [[Carnor Jax]]. Jax ordered Shev's forces to stand down while his personal fleet arrived, but Shev—eager to have something to show Jax to prevent him from noticing the corrupt and incompetent Phaeda garrison—attacked the Republic cell after the traitorous Merkon showed him the location.

[[File:Kir_Kanos_Badass_CE2.png|thumb|left|250px|Kir Kanos reveals himself as an Imperial Royal Guard.]]
Attacking with his forces in a flanking maneuver, Shev at first overpowered and surprised the New Republic base. However, Kanos—in full [[Emperor's Royal Guard/Legends|Royal Guard]] armor—leapt into combat, killing scores of Imperials and turning the tide of battle, even saving Sinn when a [[TIE/IN interceptor|TIE interceptor]] was about to kill her. [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] forces then retreated to the [[Planet/Legends|planet's]] [[Collo Fauale]] mountains, where after learning of the base from the traitor [[Tem Merkon]], the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] ship ''[[Emperor's Revenge]]'' began bombarding the mountains.

When [[Lord/Legends|Lord]] [[Carnor Jax]] took the ''Emperor's Revenge'' to [[Yinchorr/Legends|Yinchorr]], he left the bombardment to [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Vivant]] aboard the [[Steadfast (Imperial-class)/Legends|''Steadfast'']]. Commander [[Mirith Sinn]], the head of New Republic operations on Phaeda, contacted [[New Republic High Command/Legends|New Republic High Command]] and ensured that support would be incoming. [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]], piloting a collection of [[E-7 E-wing multi-role starfighter|E-wings]] and [[A/SF-01 B-wing starfighter/Legends|B-wings]], dropped out of [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] and engaged the ''Steadfast''{{'s}} complement of [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE fighters]] at over 2-1 odds, their first mission since they had been reorganized into a multi-fighter unit.
[[File:Phaeda_victory.jpg|thumb|right|250px|Rebels celebrate their victory.]]
As Sinn climbed onto a captured [[GAT-12 Skipray Blastboat|Skipray Blastboat]] and joined the fight in orbit, however, [[General/Legends|General]] [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] entered the system in the [[Super Star Destroyer]] ''[[Lusankya/Legends|Lusankya]]'', forcing the surrender of Vivant's forces. Phaeda was liberated when ''Lusankya'' deployed hundreds of assault teams onto the planet's surface.
